svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.div: File bytes in S3 (FileBucket, presigned up/download); metadata row in Postgres. File is IMMUTABLE once uploaded — correction = new document + archive old. No delete, ever: archived hides but preserves. 409 archive if ledger- or invoice-linked. One registry serves the library AND ledger/invoice attachments. member_visible is the only member-visibility mechanism; PC reads bypass it.
